channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Micron, AMD, Alibaba, AMC, Domino’s, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market  Barron's
  3. 4 stocks to watch on Monday: AMC, IREN, NBIS, MNST (SP500:)  Seeking Alpha
  4. Biggest stock movers Monday: BABA, FRVO, and more  MSN
  5. Stocks to Watch: Alibaba, Ryanair, AMC Entertainment, Micron -- WSJ  富途牛牛

item.title: China cracks down on chatbot romances as birthrate crisis worsens: report - Fox Business
item.description:
1. China cracks down on chatbot romances as birthrate crisis worsens: report  Fox Business
  2. China Wants More Babies—So It’s Cracking Down on Chatbot Love Affairs  WSJ
  3. China wants to end AI romances  The Economist
  4. China’s New AI Crackdown on Virtual Companions Leaves Heartbreak Behind  Bloomberg.com
  5. 'My heart is empty': Millions of Chinese forced to end AI relationships  ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation
